name: Peoples Xpress
description_short: Peoples Foreign Exchange offers retail foreign exchange services covering 80+ world currencies with competitive rates and professional customer service since 1987.
description_long:
Peoples Foreign Exchange, Corp. has operated as a specialized currency exchange retailer since 1987, establishing over 27 years of market presence in the foreign exchange sector. The company positions itself as a dedicated foreign exchange boutique rather than a general financial services provider, focusing exclusively on currency conversion and international money exchange needs.

The company makes market in a large basket of world currencies, providing banknotes for approximately 80 countries. Their service model emphasizes direct customer interaction, with staff available to provide personalized exchange rate quotes and currency availability checks before customer visits. The website indicates they operate from a retail location at 24 W 45th St in New York, NY, and customers can contact them at (631) 592-8080 or visit peoplesfx.com for current rates and hours.

Peoples Foreign Exchange differentiates itself through competitive exchange rates, flexibility in service delivery, and responsiveness to customer inquiries. Customer reviews highlight staff professionalism, willingness to work with customers on rate quotes, and accurate rate comparisons against competitors like Currency Exchange International. The company explicitly markets itself on "unmatched rates of exchange, flexibility and friendly service" with claims of a "complaint free zone" and "clean history."

The company operates from a non-traditional retail location (inside a vegan eatery according to one review), which may affect accessibility and hours. Operating hours vary day-to-day according to customer reports, requiring verification before visits. As a specialized currency exchange service rather than a comprehensive financial institution, they serve a specific use case: customers needing physical foreign currency for international travel or business purposes, not broader consumer finance needs.
address: Vegan Store, 24 W 45th St Front, New York, NY 10036

company_info.headquarters: Vegan Store, 24 W 45th St Front, New York, NY 10036

pros: Competitive exchange rates that beat major competitors like Currency Exchange International by $50+ on comparable transactions
Covers approximately 80 countries' banknotes, providing extensive currency selection
27+ years of established business history and operational stability since 1987
Responsive to customer inquiries and willing to provide rate quotes before visits
High customer satisfaction with 4.5-star rating across 50 reviews
Professional, efficient staff noted for not wasting customer time
Willingness to work with customers on flexible service delivery
cons: Non-standard retail location inside a vegan eatery may be inconvenient or difficult to find
Highly variable operating hours that change day-to-day, requiring website verification before visits
No indication of online ordering or mail delivery options; appears to require in-person service
Limited service scope to currency exchange only; cannot assist with broader financial needs
Some negative reviews (6 one-star ratings out of 50 reviews) suggest inconsistent service quality
best_for: International travelers needing physical foreign currency before trips to 80+ countries
Business professionals requiring frequent currency exchanges for international transactions
Customers seeking better exchange rates than major banks or currency exchange chains
People researching rates across multiple providers before committing to a currency exchange
diagnosis: Peoples Foreign Exchange is best suited for international travelers and business professionals who need physical foreign currency and are willing to comparison shop for competitive rates. The main caveat is that this is a specialized, location-dependent service with variable hours and no online fulfillment options—requiring advance planning and in-person visits to their Manhattan retail location.
services: Foreign currency exchange for approximately 80 countries
Exchange rate quotes via phone and website
